sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108376" key="u(poergepista/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποεργεπιστάτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n108376.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sub-overseer of works, LW</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17430</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Abydos</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
